overview: FleetGuard is a production-ready, mobile-first SaaS platform for transport companies to log, track, and manage fleet maintenance records. It features strict multi-tenant data isolation, role-based access (Admin, Fleet Manager, Mechanic), Stripe subscription billing, a developer portal, document management, and comprehensive reporting.
features: Multi-tenant fleet maintenance tracking with full data isolation per company
Role-based access control: Admin, Fleet Manager, Mechanic
Work orders, service schedules, and maintenance history with auto-assigned WO numbers
Parts inventory with A-Z search, usage history, and low-stock alerts
Document management: upload, preview, search, and filter files per asset
Developer portal with company management, user control, promo codes, and Stripe settings
Dashboard analytics with repair reason donut chart, monthly cost bar chart, and work order priority widget
Stripe subscription billing with 7-day free trial and discount code support
Internet Identity authentication with company-scoped onboarding wizard
